title: 菊花賞の後に・真剣勝負をもう一度

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mejiro McQueen sails through the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ryan is obviously frustrated, but she offers
her congratulations all the same.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them promise each other to share
another serious match in their next race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen then sets her sights on her next
objective: the spring Tenno Sho. She is eager to
show the culmination of all her hard work.
